column1: Izmo ltd. (founded in 1995) is into the business of interactive marketing solutions. It is the World leader in Automotive Interactive Marketing Solutions. [1] The co. offers hi-tech automotive e-retailing solutions in North America, Europe, and Asia. They offer sales performance coaching, OEM-certified CRM and ILM Solutions, etc.It also owns the world's largest collection of Automotive Images and Animation and has a client base of some of the largest automotive retail groups in the world. izmo.ai platform is for AI solutions for Automotive. [2]
